title: Titan Survival Modpack
description: A hardcore Titan Survival modpack for expert players. The world is ruled by giant Titans, and normal survival rules no longer apply. Collect resources, craft god-tier
body:
This is a Titan-themed modpack for hardcore survival players🔥, centered on Titan Creatures with powerful gear, abundant resources and optimized functions, bringing you an epic adventure from mortal to god of war!![no texts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ac39c9e2efac4721fe2053a6e8625be9cd9caac.jpeg)
1. Core Titan Content👹
Dozens of giant Titan bosses: Zombie Titan, Skeleton Titan, Iron Golem Titan, Ender Giant, Witherzilla, Execution Dragon, etc.
Each Titan has unique skills, multi-stage transformation, area destruction and minion summoning, with tens of thousands to infinite health, full of challenges.
Titans drop god-tier materials, Creator Blade, ultimate equipment, the core of late-game power.
2. Resource & Equipment System⚔️
New Titan-exclusive ores to craft ultra-high-damage weapons and invincible armor sets.
Integrated Project E, Avaritia, artifact expansion for easy god-tier crafting and infinite resources.
Added enhancement station & optimized enchantment, equipment upgradable with custom modifiers, one-hit kill to normal mobs.
3. Basic Functions & Optimization✨
One-click launch, no lag, no mod conflicts, compatible with mainstream Java versions.
Optimized terrain generation, keeps vanilla survival fun, Titans spawn randomly for more excitement.
Built-in convenient backpack, large storage, X-ray, fast mining for high survival efficiency.
Supports multiplayer online, team up with friends to fight Titans and build bases together.
4. Target Players🎮
For MC players who love hardcore challenges, giant boss battles, god gear progression and multiplayer, no boredom, full of thrill!
